notes: Full Claude Code power: it can now actually create and edit files and run the shell, so it can build and save real documents and PDFs — no more silently blocked actions. Send a follow-up while a reply is still streaming: it queues (a grey chip you can delete) and sends automatically, in order, the moment the reply finishes. Right-click a chat tab to copy its title or the whole conversation. Auto-update now checks hourly and on wake, not only at launch. Onboarding: the Re-check button is visible without scrolling.
